creator: cs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry, I don't understand. The last entry in this Changelog says for example:

  * FreeBSD
    + Support for FreeBSD7.
    + Support for sendmail 8.14
    + Support all ifconfig options in the network_interfaces directive.

So, it seems to me that FreeBSD is supported. Anyway. You -- of course -- have also the option to send this port back to the pool and give up maintainership. But, I have still doubts giving up this port entirely.

Any comments?
